ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey purpose */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the survey */,
  "survey_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the survey in minutes */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of survey approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Description of the target population for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey item */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey this item belongs to */,
  "item_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., rating, open-ended) */,
  "ticks" TEXT /* Possible response values for the item */,
  "tick_labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with each tick for response */,
  "response_width" REAL /* Width allocated for responses */,
  "scoring" TEXT /* Scoring mechanism used (+ or -) */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Psychological factor this item measures */,
  "item_order" INTEGER /* Order of the item within the survey */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is mandatory */,
  "sub_factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a sub-factor if the item measures a specific sub-trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_items_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_items_sub_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey item being responded to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response given by the participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the item */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the participant for security and audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES survey_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., student, researcher) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "consent_granted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has granted consent for data usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological factor (e.g., Extraversion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the factor entails */,
  "parent_factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent factor if it is a sub-factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_methods" (
  "scoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the scoring method (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scoring method */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used for scoring if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scoring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant associated with this account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this report is generated from */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report including analysis and findings */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
